recommendations.title: Ten Inch Hero
recommendations.overview: Four friends search for love and happiness while working at a California sandwich shop.

recommendations.title: Don Jon
recommendations.overview: A New Jersey guy dedicated to his family, friends, and church, develops unrealistic expectations from watching porn and works to find happiness and intimacy with his potential true love.

recommendations.title: La Jetée
recommendations.overview: A man confronts his past during an experiment that attempts to find a solution to the problems of a post-apocalyptic world caused by a world war.

recommendations.title: Nickel Boys
recommendations.overview: Chronicles the powerful friendship between two young Black teenagers navigating the harrowing trials of reform school together in Florida.

recommendations.title: Leave Her to Heaven
recommendations.overview: A socialite marries a prominent novelist, which spurs a violent, obsessive, and dangerous jealousy in her.

recommendations.title: In a Lonely Place
recommendations.overview: A violent screenwriter and a female neighbor fall in love after she clears him of murder, but she begins to have second thoughts.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Miss Potter
recommendations.overview: Beatrix Potter, the author of the beloved children's book "The Tale of Peter Rabbit", struggles for love, happiness and success.

recommendations.title: The Map of Tiny Perfect Things
recommendations.overview: Two teenagers trapped in an endless time loop set out to find all the tiny things that make that one day perfect.

recommendations.title: Happiness
recommendations.overview: The story of a rodent's unrelenting quest for happiness and fulfillment.
